steps.title: Identify the blank's function and subject
steps.content: The blank is the main verb in “In English, this phrase ______ roughly to...” The subject is “this phrase” (singular).

steps.title: Match the correct verb form
steps.content:
Only “translates” (choice D) is a conjugated verb in the form that works with a singular subject.

The other choices are different verb forms—infinitive (“to translate”), gerund (“translating”), and perfect participle (“having translated”)—that cannot work as the main verb of this clause.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
